name: Photo captions
description: Looks at each new photo's preview (never the original) and stages a one-line caption plus scene tags — machine-attributed, searchable, and yours to overrule.
prompt: When new photos arrive, look at each one's preview and write a one-line caption plus a few scene tags with confidence scores. Stage them into the vault as machine annotations under the enrichment connection. Never overwrite anything I wrote myself, and never send original bytes anywhere.

vault.why: Reads new photos' preview/thumb derivatives, asks a vision model for captions and tags, and stages them on the vault's enrichment connection (issue #299).
